Best first step

New to chopsticks?

Start with grip, then compare materials, then read etiquette. That order solves the biggest beginner friction first.

Start with the how-to guide
Chopsticks Guide

This site explains chopstick use, materials, etiquette, and cultural context for educational reference. It does not provide medical, nutritional, or product safety guarantees.
